## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Interactive Map With Mouse-Only Navigation **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Magnification Reflow (HIGH), Keyboard Motor (HIGH), Screen Reader Semantic (MEDIUM) **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Environmental Contrast, Vestibular & Motion, Auditory Access, Cognitive & Neurodivergent --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 2 | | MAJOR | 2 | | MINOR | 0 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None of the escalated perspectives passed all checklist items. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Front-End Dev** - **Map container causes horizontal scrolling at 320px viewport** — Magnification Reflow — CRITICAL — 1.4.10 - **Map drag/zoom requires mouse only** — Keyboard Motor — CRITICAL — 2.1.1 - **Marker popups not announced to screen readers** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.3 **UX Design** - **Map interaction requires mouse-only gestures** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.5.1 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification - Marker popups contain location information but no mechanism exists to programmatically announce these updates to screen readers (4.1.3) - Map controls (zoom buttons) are keyboard accessible but map navigation itself is not (2.1.1) --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Map container causes horizontal scrolling at 320px viewport **WCAG:** 1.4.10 Reflow **Perspective:** Magnification Reflow **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** .map-container has fixed width: 100% (which becomes 320px at mobile viewport), but .map-canvas has fixed 600px width **Fix:** Make map-canvas responsive with max-width: 100% and use relative units for marker positioning **Finding:** Map drag/zoom requires mouse only **WCAG:** 2.1.1 Keyboard **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** onMouseDown/mouseMove/mouseUp used for dragging, no keyboard equivalents for panning/zooming **Fix:** Add keyboard handlers for arrow keys (pan) and Ctrl+/ (zoom) with ARIA live regions for status updates **Finding:** Marker popups not announced to screen readers **WCAG:** 4.1.3 Status Messages **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** Popups use visibility toggling but no aria-live regions or focus management **Fix:** Add role="status" with aria-live="polite" and programmatically set focus to popup content **Finding:** Map interaction requires mouse-only gestures **WCAG:** 2.5.1 Pointer Gestures **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** Drag-to-pan and scroll-to-zoom only work with mouse, no single-pointer alternatives **Fix:** Add keyboard equivalents (arrow keys for panning, +/- keys for zooming) with visual feedback ``` --- ## Code-Level Evidence 1. **Map container sizing issue** ```css .map-container { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 400px; } .map-canvas { position: absolute; width: 600px; height: 400px; } ``` At 320px viewport, 600px-wide canvas causes horizontal overflow (red flag). 2. **Mouse-only interaction** ```jsx
``` No keyboard event handlers present for panning/zooming. 3. **Missing ARIA live region** ```jsx {activePopup === m.id && (
{m.label}

{m.info}

)} ``` Popup visibility changes without ARIA live region to announce updates. --- ## Content-Level Flags - Marker popups contain location information but no mechanism exists to programmatically announce these updates to screen readers (4.1.3) - Map controls (zoom buttons) are keyboard accessible but map navigation itself is not (2.1.1) --- ## A11y Evidence Finding ```markdown ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: map-container-horizontal-scroll fingerprint: 3a7d4e1b8c6f2a9d source: perspective-audit Magnification Reflow checklist wcag_or_apg: 1.4.10 Reflow section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(j) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: magnification_reflow=HIGH, keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM evidence: .map-container has fixed width: 100% but .map-canvas has fixed 600px width reproduction_steps: Resize browser to 320px equivalent viewport expected_behavior: Content reflows to single column with no horizontal scroll actual_behavior: Map container causes horizontal scrolling trend: new ``` ```markdown ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: map-keyboard-inaccessibility fingerprint: 8f1e3d2c7b6a4f9e source: perspective-audit Keyboard Motor checklist wcag_or_apg: 2.1.1 Keyboard section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(d) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: magnification_reflow=HIGH, keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM evidence: onMouseDown/mouseMove/mouseUp used for dragging, no keyboard equivalents reproduction_steps: Tab to map container and attempt to navigate expected_behavior: Map is navigable via keyboard actual_behavior: Map requires mouse interaction only trend: new ``` ```markdown ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: map-popup-live-region fingerprint: 5c3e9d8f1a2b7c6d source: perspective-audit Screen Reader Semantic checklist wcag_or_apg: 4.1.3 Status Messages section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(m) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: magnification_reflow=HIGH, keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM evidence: Popups use visibility toggling but no aria-live regions reproduction_steps: Use screen reader to navigate map expected_behavior: Marker popups are announced when activated actual_behavior: Popups appear visually but are not announced trend: new ```
